How cute
is Your Child?

Join the #KiddiesCrownContest and give your child the chance to shine!

JOIN CONTESTLearn More

Kiddies Crown Contest

Activities Roadmap

Register

Registration confirms your child as an official Kiddies Crown Contest participant with accurate details.

Campaign

You’ll receive a campaign poster to help your child gather votes from friends and family.

Vote

Active campaigning and vote gathering are essential to help your child shine as the contest’s star.

Win

Winners will be crowned Mr. or Miss Crown 2025, and awarded ₦5,000,000, Christmas prizes.

Our Purpose

Our purpose is to bring fun to Nigerian families this Christmas holiday by strengthening the bond between parents and their children, while creating an exciting platform for families to showcase their connection and creativity. Winners will be crowned Parent and Child of the Year 2025.

Meet Our Past Winners

Some of our prestige winners in the past contest

Grand Winner
1st Edition

Oluwafisolami Ivy Obadina

Gender: Female

Age: 1 year

Joyful, friendly Ivy Fisola brings happiness, blessing, and leadership to her loving family.
Grand Winner
2nd Edition

Comfort Diamond Ene Samuel

Gender: Female

Age: 1 year

Joyful and tidy Baby D brings love and pride to her devoted family.
Grand Winner
3rd Edition

Brian Uchechukwu

Gender: Male

Age: 1 year

Joyful and friendly Brian inspires everyone with his bright spirit, deep roots, and promise.
Grand Winner
4th Edition

Elena Grace Johnson

Gender: Female

Age: 1 year

Playful and inquisitive Elena brings wonder, happiness, and unforgettable moments to her family.
